query:
UPDATE book_profiles 
SET coverImageUrl = NULL, s3CoverUrl = NULL, s3CoverKey = NULL
WHERE bookTitle IN (
  'Obviously Awesome',
  'Sales Pitch',
  'Thinking, Fast and Slow',
  'Super Agers',
  'Abundance',
  'Crossing the Chasm, 3rd Edition',
  '7 Powers_ The Foundations of Business Strategy',
  'Building Successful Partner Channels',
  'Going Global on a Shoestring',
  'Great Game Business',
  'Lead Engaging Meetings',
  'No: The Only Negotiating System You Need',
  'Steve Jobs_ The Man Who Thought Different_ A Biography',
  'Yes, And',
  'Active Listening Techniques',
  'Chasing Perfection',
  'We Are All Made of Molecules',
  'Sapiens',
  'Never Split the Difference by Chris Voss'
);
command:
